properties.description: Detects sign-ins from two geographically distant locations within a timeframe that makes physical travel impossible. Maps to MITRE ATT&CK T1550 - Use Alternate Authentication Material.
properties.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ResultType == 0
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Location, CountryOrRegion = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion), City = tostring(LocationDetails.city), AppDisplayName
| join kind=inner (
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | project TimeGenerated2 = TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress2 = IPAddress, Location2 = Location, CountryOrRegion2 = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion), City2 = tostring(LocationDetails.city)
) on UserPrincipalName
| where CountryOrRegion != CountryOrRegion2
| where abs(datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, TimeGenerated2)) < 60
| where TimeGenerated < TimeGenerated2
| extend MITRETechnique = "T1550 - Use Alternate Authentication Material", RiskLevel = "Medium"
| project UserPrincipalName, FirstSignInLocation = Location, FirstSignInCountry = CountryOrRegion, FirstSignInTime = TimeGenerated, SecondSignInLocation = Location2, SecondSignInCountry = CountryOrRegion2, SecondSignInTime = TimeGenerated2, IPAddress, MITRETechnique, RiskLevel
